title: What is the Eva Collectors Disc where can it be bought
display_title: What is the Eva Collectors Disc where can it be bought
wikitext:
[]: What is the Eva Collector's Disc, where can it be bought?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Sun Jun 07, 2009 4:27 pm That Reichu got her screencaps from as on http://evacommentary.org/episode-m26/episode-m26-scene08B.html#cut336 What is the catalog # please?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jun 07, 2009 4:52 pm Just pirate it. Arrrrrrrrrr!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jun 09, 2009 12:02 pm ?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 13, 2009 9:41 am I only have the first six (got lucky and bought them off an acquaintance in Australia for cheap); missing the seventh plus the GOS one. The cheapest I've seen the others go for is 4000 each on Yahoo! Japan Auctions, plus shipping and proxy charges... Yeah, maybe later. The discs only have ISBNs far as I can tell (only listed on the obis, too -- weird). Vol. 1: 4-984841-011202 Vol. 2: 4-984841-011219 Vol. 3: 4-984841-011226 Vol. 4: 4-984841-011233 Vol. 5: 4-984841-011233 (same ISBN? wha?) Vol. 6: 4-984841-011257 If the images and crap are all you want, here are 1-6 (half a gig). Very out of print, so why not.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Jan 13, 2011 12:27 am RISE FROM THE GRAVE TO GRANT MY WISH. Hey Reichu, can you possibly re-upload these or tell me how to access your magical containment system?

[]:             Quote Post by visionfactory » Thu Jan 13, 2011 12:32 am I'd like to download what you're talking about too, I need a user and pass.
